summary: Implement real critic/repair loop in go-loop executor
description: auto/go-loop --execute currently claims tasks and runs verification, but it does not perform actual code edits, recheck/devil critic passes, repair attempts, or structured attempt ledgers. Add executor contract or adapter hooks that make the Ralph/Oh-My-Codex claim true.
acceptance: go-loop execution has explicit attempt states: build/verify/critic/repair/judge.
Tests prove a failing verification becomes repair attempt or actionable blocked state with critic evidence, not just blocked immediately.

evidence.summary: Added structured go-loop/auto execute attempts with build/verify/critic/repair/judge fields, auto.attempt events, and failing verification critic evidence before blocking. Verification: pytest -q 11 passed; make check passed; python3 cli/go.py validate . passed; git diff --check passed.
